LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING SUBJECT TO RESOLVING ISSUES IN THE STATEMENT OF DECISION PROCESS. RESPONDENT JOSEPH PHELPS VINEYARDS, LLC'S VERIFIED PETITION TO VACATE JAMS "SUPPLEMENT TO ARBITRATION AWARD" [CCP 1286.2(A)] IS GRANTED. THE AWARD WAS NOT MADE WITHIN 90 DAYS OF SUBMISSION OF THE DISPUTE AND CANNOT BE CHARACTERIZED AS A MODIFICATION ADDRESSING AN INADVERTENT OMISSION. THE NECESSARY STEPS WERE NOT TAKEN TO EXTEND JURISDICTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 30 DAYS AND IN ANY EVENT, THE AWARD WAS NOT ISSUED WITHIN 120 DAYS. MR. ROSENFELD WILL PREPARE A STATEMENT OF DECISION GIVING MR. THOMPSON AN OPPORTUNITY TO ADDRESS OBJECTIONS AND SUGGESTIONS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE STATUTE AND RULES OF COURT CONCERNING STATEMENT OF DECISION. MATTER IS DEEMED SUBMITTED UPON SUBMISSION OF THESE OBJECTIONS AND SUGGESTIONS. THE STATEMENT OF DECISION AND OBJECTIONS/SUGGESTIONS SHOULD BE SUBMITTED IN ELECTRONIC FORM. JUDGE: PETER J.
